decks.notes: The main focus of this landless combo deck is to quickly assemble the Hydroelectric Specimen-Tameshi, Reality Architect combo and win the game. The deck utilizes a mix of control spells and card draw to protect the combo pieces and manipulate the opponent's resources. Cards like Disrupting Shoal and Force of Negation provide interaction, while Jwari Disruption and Stern Scolding help disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck also includes Whir of Invention to tutor for key combo pieces and Suppression Ray for additional disruption. The win condition is usually achieved through activating Goblin Charbelcher with a high storm count.

The deck focuses on aggressive plays using low-cost creatures such as Guide of Souls and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer, backed up by efficient removal spells like Galvanic Discharge and Solitude. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Voice of Victory provide powerful enhancements to the creatures, while Ranger-Captain of Eos helps find key cards. The inclusion of Goblin Bombardment adds an extra threat to the opponent, while Blood Moon disrupts non-basic land strategies. The deck also includes some utility lands and cards like Thraben Charm and The Legend of Roku for added versatility in combat situations.

The Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly deploying aggressive creatures and utilizing a mix of burn spells and creature abilities to maintain board control and pressure the opponent. By quickly establishing a strong board presence and using cards like Guide of Souls and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer to disrupt the opponent's game plan, the deck aims to finish the game before the opponent can stabilize. Utilizing cards like Goblin Bombardment and Static Prison, the deck can protect its creatures and prevent the opponent from mounting a successful defense, leading to a swift victory.

The deck revolves around quickly generating mana and storm count to cast a large Grapeshot or utilize other burn spells to win the game. It includes cards like Ral, Monsoon Mage and Wrenn's Resolve to help with card advantage and protection, as well as Past in Flames to potentially recast spells from the graveyard. The deck aims to combo off as early as possible while controlling the game through efficient card draw and selective use of resources. The inclusion of Ruby Medallion and other spells allow for explosive turns and quick kills.

The deck focuses on utilizing cheap and efficient creatures to deal damage quickly, while also incorporating removal spells and combat tricks to maintain board control. The inclusion of cards like Guide of Souls and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer helps to generate card advantage and pressure the opponent. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Voices of Victory provide powerful combat buffs to the team, allowing for aggressive plays. Goblin Bombardment and Fable of the Mirror-Breaker offer additional reach and damage potential to close out games. The mana base is streamlined to ensure consistent casting of spells and creatures.

This Aggro-Affinity deck focuses on utilizing artifact creatures and synergistic spells to quickly overwhelm opponents with a mix of aggressive creatures and disruption. By deploying cheap artifacts and utilizing cards like Arcbound Ravager and Pinnacle Emissary, the deck aims to control the board and deal damage efficiently. Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Engineered Explosives provide additional utility and removal options, while cards like Mishra's Bauble and Mox Opal help to ensure consistent card draw and mana acceleration. With a focus on efficiency and consistency, this deck aims to outpace opponents and secure victories in rapid fashion.

The main goal of this deck is to quickly get powerful creatures into the graveyard and then bring them back onto the battlefield utilizing the reanimation abilities of cards like Persist and Unearth. By using cards like Faithless Looting, Thoughtseize, and Thought Scour to help fill up the graveyard and control the opponent's hand, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with large creatures such as Emperor of Bones and Archon of Cruelty. The deck also includes removal spells like Fatal Push and Spell Pierce to help deal with any threats from the opponent.

The deck focuses on combining aggressive creatures with blink effects to maximize value and disrupt opponents. By utilizing cards like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Quantum Riddler, the deck aims to apply early pressure while protecting its threats with cards like Solitude and Teferi, Time Raveler. Consign to Memory and Fable of the Mirror-Breaker provide additional removal and card advantage, while Ephemerate and March of Otherworldly Light allow for repeated creature triggers. The mana base is built to support a variety of colors for flexibility in casting spells.

The deck focuses on quickly filling up the graveyard with powerful creatures like Emperor of Bones and Archon of Cruelty using cards like Faithless Looting and Thought Scour. It then utilizes the reanimation abilities of Unearth and Persist to bring these creatures back onto the battlefield for a powerful combo finish. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Thoughtseize and Fatal Push to control the opponent's game plan while steadily advancing its own. The land base is carefully constructed to support the deck's color requirements and maximize efficiency.

This deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with cards like Arboreal Grazer and Azusa, Lost but Seeking to play powerful threats like Primeval Titan. By utilizing cards like Amulet of Vigor and Gruul Turf, the deck can generate massive amounts of mana to cast game-ending spells like Scapeshift or Cultivator Colossus. The deck also includes toolbox cards like Green Sun's Zenith and Summoner's Pact to find the necessary pieces for the combo. With lands like Urza's Saga and Boseiju, Who Endures for protection, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents with explosive plays.

The main focus of this deck is to utilize the creatures and spells to assemble a powerful combo using Broodscale Bloodchief as the centerpiece. By ramping up with Eldrazi Temple and Urza's Saga, and using cards like Kozilek's Command and Malevolent Rumble for control, the deck aims to quickly bring out formidable threats like Emrakul, the Promised End and Walking Ballista. The inclusion of Blade of the Bloodchief and Writhing Chrysalis adds additional support for the combo, while cards like Vexing Bauble and Ancient Stirrings help with card selection and consistency.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly establishing a board presence with efficient creatures like Guide of Souls and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer. It also includes burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Galvanic Discharge to control the board and finish off opponents. The inclusion of Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Voice of Victory provides additional synergy and power to the deck. The deck also has some utility cards like Thraben Charm and Goblin Bombardment for added versatility. Overall, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents with aggressive creatures and burn spells while maintaining card advantage through efficient plays.

The key concept of this deck revolves around utilizing the Broodscale Bloodchief combo to generate value and control the board. By combining Basking Broodscale with cards like Glaring Fleshraker and Malevolent Rumble, the deck aims to create a powerful synergistic engine that can overwhelm opponents. Additionally, the inclusion of Haywire Mite and Walking Ballista provides additional tools for dealing with threats while Emrakul, the Promised End offers a powerful finisher. The deck also features cards like Ancient Stirrings and Kozilek's Command for consistency and flexibility in different situations.

The deck focuses on quickly dumping big creatures into the graveyard and then reanimating them with spells like Goryo's Vengeance. Psychic Frog and Quantum Riddler provide card advantage and disruption, while Solitude and Atraxa, Grand Unifier offer protection and control. Superior Spider-Man and Griselbrand are powerful reanimation targets that can swing the game in your favor. Ephemerate helps to protect your creatures and can create powerful combos. The deck includes a mix of removal, disruption, and card draw to help you stay ahead while setting up your game-winning reanimation plays.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on aggressive creature plays, efficient removal, and disruptive enchantments to quickly overwhelm opponents. By utilizing low-cost creatures like Guide of Souls and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer, along with powerful planeswalkers like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah, the deck aims to establish a strong board presence early on. Additional support comes from cards like Galvanic Discharge for removal, Mana Tithe and Thraben Charm for disruption, and Static Prison for control. The inclusion of enchantments like Arena of Glory and Fable of the Mirror-Breaker adds versatility and extra value to the deck's strategy.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with fast, aggressive creatures and burn spells. By using cards like Dragon's Rage Channeler, Monastery Swiftspear, and Slickshot Show-Off, along with powerful burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Lava Dart, the deck aims to deal damage quickly and efficiently. The inclusion of cards like Mutagenic Growth and Violent Urge allows for additional combat tricks and damage potential. The deck also includes card advantage engines like Mishra's Bauble and Expressive Iteration to maintain tempo and pressure on the opponent.
